since_last: 66% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.99%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 66% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -2.47% · Gold -2.25% · Nasdaq100 -0.99%. 66% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.99%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.99%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.56%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INTC is the standout at +9.27%
cards.body: Leaders: INTC +9.27%, MRVL +6.03%, LRCX +5.40%, TER +4.98%, KLAC +4.96%. Laggards: IBM -4.42%, SPCX -2.93%, WDAY -1.50%, INTU -1.39%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.93% at $186.19
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.93% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
